action.reasoning: Observation: 80.75% with ensemble, best 80.87% single model. Checkpoints may have been overwritten. With ~47 min and 7 iters left, need to be strategic. Analysis: The ensemble is hurting because some checkpoints are suboptimal. Decision: Check checkpoint quality, then do a focused training with better Phase 2 strategy - use DivideMix-inspired approach with co-training or just better regularization.
